description_long: This is a compact, modern sofa upholstered in a rich blue fabric, featuring a gently curved backrest and armrests that seamlessly flow into each other. The seat and backrest are adorned with subtle button tufting, adding a touch of classic elegance to its contemporary silhouette. The sofa sits on four slender, slightly tapered legs with a metallic finish, providing a light and airy appearance while ensuring stability. The armrests are moderately high and padded, matching the height of the backrest for a cohesive look. The seat cushion appears to be a single, continuous piece, while the backrest is integrated and tufted for added comfort and style. This piece would be well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or stylish outdoor patios.
description: A modern blue sofa with a curved, tufted backrest and armrests, supported by four metallic tapered legs. The upholstery is smooth with subtle button tufting, giving it a refined yet contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved, tufted backrest, single seat cushion, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the curve of the armrest, and the slender metallic legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous backrest and the placement of the rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest and leg design seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion with an integrated, tufted backrest; all cushions are attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, seamlessly integrated with the sofa's frame and lacking decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, slightly tapered metallic legs positioned at the corners, exposed and finished in a silver tone.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous curved backrest with button tufting, integrated with the armrests and seat.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a smooth texture and subtle button tufting on the backrest; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
